title: glaucium grandiflorum var. judaicum
intro: Glaucium grandiflorum var. judaicum, also known as the Judean poppy or Jerusalem poppy, is a plant species within the Papaveraceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, derived from the alkaloid glaucine, which is a potent pain reliever. The health benefits of Glaucium grandiflorum var. judaicum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
